---
title: "The Rev. Dr. John Collier Jones"
---

## The Rev. Dr. John Collier Jones

**Dates:** (1760-1838)

### Description

Rector of Exeter College, Oxford, uncle-in-law of CMY

### Biography

He married (1825) Charlotte (Yonge) Crawley, aunt and godmother to CMY. [<i>Morning Chronicle</i> 17 Jan 1825]

### Letters

- Letter from July 4, 1834

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
